title: Contact - Emily Thornberry
text_excerpt: Contact - Emily Thornberry Skip to main content Emily Thornberry For Islington South and Finsbury Join Get Involved Donate About Emily Newsletter Your campaigns Foreign Policy Home Affairs Finance & Economy Nature & Environment Islington South and Finsbury Visits Events Councillors Contact Help with the cost of living Careers More Menu Contact Meeting staff at the Whittington Maternity Unit. We hold two constituency surgeries a month, one by appointment and one walk in surgery. Our walk-in surgery is the second Saturday of every month, between 10am-12noon, at Islington Town Hall, Upper Street. Strict parliamentary protocol dictates that MPs are only able to assist with their own constituents’ cases. Please check that your postcode falls into the Islington South and Finsbury constituency before attending. You can do so here. If you want to make an appointment for our other surgery, please ring our advice line or send an email to emily.thornberry.mp@parliament.uk Emily Thornberry Contact details Rt Hon Emily Thornberry MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA Rt Hon Emily Thornberry MP House of Commons London SW1A 0AA '> View on Google Maps Email: emily.thornberry.mp@parliament.uk Further details Published and promoted by Emily Thornberry MP, 65 Barnsbury Street, N1 1EJ ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
